senior.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
senior.note: 3rd EM cycle — no PR filed yet. Design phase must end. Action required: begin implementation. Decisions needed: (1) browser.* action class vs shell.exec extension, (2) URL scope matching strategy, (3) pacing correction feedback model. Start with stub invariant definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. Prior assignment #1449 (PR #1469) is merged and closed.

secondary.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
secondary.note: 3rd EM cycle — no PR filed yet. PauseRequested/PauseResolved event schema already exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts. Start with hook in packages/kernel/src/decision.ts for irreversibility detection. Open questions: boolean vs score, headless timeout behavior.

maintenance.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
maintenance.note: Fix is narrow: add .agentguard/squads/** exemption to OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. Same class as #1427 (persona.env exemption). Assign to senior coder as KE-9 maintenance item alongside #1384.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.recommendation: Add .agentguard/squads/** exemption to OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. Well-precedented fix (same class as #1427). Affects all EM agents. Assign to kernel-senior as maintenance item.
